reach_why: Extends known continual-learning concerns to hidden-boundary deployment, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links benchmark segmentation, latent shifts, and worsening control despite improving aggregate performance.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing benchmarked and latent-shift deployments on accuracy, editability, legibility, and rare-case failure severity.
explanation: Average gains can mask worsening controllability under hidden task shifts and rare true phenomena.
